lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What are you doing down here?

lines.speaker: Fullangr
lines.text: I'm working on the digging, of course.

lines.speaker: Fullangr
lines.text: It's a small excavation, so only two of us can work on it at a time.

lines.speaker: Fullangr
lines.text: Thorodin and Donal were working on it earlier, but I hear Donal's run off to hide in the inn.

lines.speaker: Fullangr
lines.text: Apparently he saw a monster when he was in the caves.

lines.speaker: Fullangr
lines.text: I'm not scared of monsters - I won't let them stop me from digging!
